name: CheckFeeApplicable
businessLogic: Read featureType from SlotsDTO and initialise isFeeApplicable to 'false'.

If featureType is 'FundTransfer', retrieve the list of TransferLegContext from SlotsDTO; filter DEBIT legs whose referenceContract contains a non-empty transferFee; collect matching account numbers into feeApplicableAccounts; set isFeeApplicable to 'true' if the list is non-empty.

If featureType is 'MultiCreditTransaction', retrieve the list of TransferLegContext from SlotsDTO; filter CREDIT legs whose referenceContract contains a non-empty depositFee; collect matching account numbers into feeApplicableAccounts; set isFeeApplicable to 'true' if the list is non-empty.

If featureType is 'MultiDebitTransaction', retrieve the list of TransferLegContext from SlotsDTO; filter DEBIT legs whose referenceContract contains a non-empty withdrawalFee; collect matching account numbers into feeApplicableAccounts; set isFeeApplicable to 'true' if the list is non-empty.
If no leg contexts are found for any feature type, set feeApplicableAccounts to an empty list and leave isFeeApplicable as 'false'.
Set the computed isFeeApplicable and feeApplicableAccounts values back onto SlotsDTO.
